name: traceless-style-vscode
description: IDE-grade tooling for traceless-style: autocomplete, color swatches, hover docs, diagnostics, code actions, outline, definitions, references, rename, signature help, folding, selection ranges, workspace search, inlay hints, snippets, and a privacy-respecting status bar.
author: Spark Golden Tech <contact@sparkgoldentech.com>

untrustedWorkspaces.description: traceless-style is a pure language-services extension. It reads source text, never executes user code, and makes no network calls.

traceless-style.enable.description: Enable autocomplete, hover, swatches, diagnostics, and outline inside tl.create({...}).

traceless-style.diagnostics.description: Show inline squigglies for unknown CSS properties, non-literal values, and suspicious value content.

traceless-style.identifierAliases.description: Identifiers treated as the traceless-style API root.

traceless-style.inlayHints.description: Show ghost-text rule counts next to each tl.create group key.

traceless-style.statusBar.description: Show the current file's group + rule count in the status bar.

traceless-style.trace.description: Diagnostic logging to the 'traceless-style' output channel (local only — no telemetry).

traceless-style.contrast.enable.description: Inline WCAG contrast diagnostics inside tl.create({...}) — flags text + UI-component pairs that fall below 1.4.3 / 1.4.6 / 1.4.11. Quick-fixes apply hue-preserving accessibility-grade replacements.

traceless-style.contrast.level.description: Highest WCAG tier the diagnostics aim for. AA is the legal floor (Section 508, EN 301 549). AAA is best-effort enhanced contrast (matches Apple HIG / IBM Carbon / Microsoft Fluent published bars).

traceless-style.contrast.surfaceLight.description: Assumed page surface color in light mode. Used to composite translucent backgrounds before measurement.

traceless-style.contrast.surfaceDark.description: Assumed page surface color in dark mode. Used to composite translucent backgrounds before measurement.

traceless-style.codeLens.description: Show an actionable summary line above each tl.create / tl.keyframes / tl.extend call (rule counts, variant counts, dark-override counts, plus quick-action links).

commands.title: traceless-style: Sort tl.create keys at cursor
traceless-style: Preview emitted CSS for the active file

walkthroughs.title: Get started with traceless-style
walkthroughs.description: A 60-second tour of every IDE feature this extension adds.

steps.title: Install the library in your project
steps.description: Run `npm install traceless-style` in your project, then `npx traceless-style init` to scaffold layout, scripts, and config.

steps.title: Autocomplete inside tl.create
steps.description: Open any .tsx file. Type `tl.create({ btn: { p` — autocomplete shows every CSS property prefixed with `p`. Pick one with Tab.

steps.title: Inline color swatches
steps.description: Color values get an inline swatch. Click the swatch to open VS Code's native color picker — format-preserving when you pick a new value.

steps.title: Inline diagnostics
steps.description: Typos like `colour: "red"` get a red squiggle. Press `Ctrl+.` for a one-click "Replace with `color`" quick-fix.

steps.title: Jump, find, rename
steps.description: Ctrl+click `$.btn` → its declaration. Shift+F12 → every usage. F2 → rename atomically across the file.

steps.title: Outline + workspace search
steps.description: Ctrl+Shift+O — outline of the current file. Ctrl+T — search every group across the whole project.
